name: Fruit Cookies #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together margarine and granulated sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs; beat until fluffy.
3. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg in a sifter.
4. Add the dry ingredients alternately with hot apple juice to the creamed mixture.
5. Fold in chopped raisins and currants.
6. Allow the dough to rest for 15 minutes.
7. Drop teaspoonfuls of dough onto a lightly greased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 to 3 inches apart.
8. Bake at 350°F (170°C) for 12 to 15 minutes.
